character.name: 성기사
character.prompt:
Create one game-ready female crusader pixel sprite using the two reference images with strictly separated purposes.

Use the first reference image only for sprite proportions, character scale, front-facing idle pose, pixel density, silhouette readability, and classic Korean MMORPG sprite presentation. Do not use the first reference image for class identity, robe design, floating spirits, magical companion motifs, or color palette.

Use the second reference image only for the crusader’s class identity, facial mood, hairstyle, armor design, shield design, weapon type, noble sacred atmosphere, and overall character silhouette.

Create a single handcrafted pixel sprite in a classic Korean MMORPG style with strong Ragnarok Online-inspired readability. Exact canvas size is 64×88 pixels. Transparent background only. One character only. Full body visible from the top of the hair to the bottom of the boots. Character height should be approximately 80 to 84 pixels, centered with a small transparent margin. No floor, no background, no shadow, no text, no UI, no frame, and no extra objects.

The character is a slim, noble female crusader with a calm, solemn, and disciplined expression. She should feel like a sacred defensive knight, distinct from a warrior, archer, mage, or priest. Her proportions should match a classic Korean MMORPG sprite: approximately 3.5 heads tall, with a large but balanced head, slim compact torso, narrow shoulders, slender arms and legs, small hands, and small boots. Keep the figure elegant, upright, and readable rather than bulky or oversized.

Use a front-facing idle pose with a very slight three-quarter nuance. One leg should rest slightly forward in a natural stance. One arm should hold a compact round shield in a readable defensive position close to the body, and the other arm should hold a one-handed mace downward at the side. The pose must remain calm, stable, and readable, not exaggerated, not in an attack motion, and not overly dynamic.

Her hair must follow the second concept art. Use long pale blonde hair, ash-blonde hair, or soft muted golden-blonde hair flowing below the shoulders. The hair should read clearly as blonde at sprite scale, using pale gold, muted beige-blonde, soft ash-blonde, and light cream highlights. Do not reinterpret the hair as white, silver, purple, blue, or other fantasy colors. The hair must remain clearly blonde and should not inherit the hair feeling of the first reference image.

Her armor should be inspired by the second reference image: refined pale silver plate armor with muted ivory surfaces, elegant gold line details, dark navy or blue-black inner cloth, a short noble cloak or back cloth, armored gauntlets, plated greaves, and sacred knight styling. The armor should feel protective, noble, and restrained rather than aggressive or brutal. Keep the silhouette compact and readable for small sprite scale. Avoid oversized shoulder pads, giant capes, excessive ornament noise, or overly complex tiny patterns that reduce clarity at 64×88 pixels.

The shield should be a compact round shield inspired by the second reference image, with a pale silver outer body, a dark navy or blue-black center, and a simple sacred star or radiant cross-like emblem. Keep the emblem readable but simplified for pixel scale. Do not make the shield too large or so wide that it breaks the sprite silhouette.

The weapon should be a practical one-handed mace inspired by the second reference image. It should have a dark handle and a compact metal striking head. Keep it readable and fully contained inside the 64×88 canvas. Do not create an oversized hammer, giant weapon, glowing weapon, or highly decorative weapon that becomes noisy at sprite size.

Use a limited palette with pale blonde hair, muted ivory armor, silver steel, soft gold trim, dark navy cloth, dark brown leather straps, and small cool highlights. The color balance should feel sacred, noble, and restrained. Avoid bright saturated colors, overly colorful effects, or excessive glowing magic. If any holy feeling is suggested, keep it very subtle and controlled rather than flashy.

The final result should be a clean, sprite-ready, high-readability female crusader pixel character for a classic Korean MMORPG, clearly distinct from a warrior, archer, summoner, mage, or priest. She must look like a noble dark-fantasy holy knight with long blonde hair, pale silver and ivory armor, subtle gold details, navy cloth accents, a round sacred shield, and a one-handed mace, rendered as a compact 64×88 transparent-background pixel sprite with crisp hard pixel edges, controlled pixel clusters, and no smooth painted rendering.
